results.title: ‘He Knows You're Alone' actress Caitlin O'Heaney dies at 73
results.description: ‘He Knows You’re Alone’ actress Caitlin O’Heaney dies at 73 He Knows You’re Alone star Caitlin O’Heaney has passed away at the age of 73. The actress, who starred as the stalked bride in the cult slasher film, breathed her last on Monday, May...

results.title: Meghan Markle reduces popstar to tears with heartfelt gesture
results.description: Meghan Markle seemed to have gotten some attention from a major popstar following an emotional milestone. The Duke and Duchess of Sussex recently celebrated their eight-year wedding anniversary and to mark that occasion, the former Suits actress had dropped two carousels of unseen photos...
